title: PR Rework Assessment
description: Output format for the PR tasks stage. The coder lists which checks need code changes (rework) vs which were resolved via non-code actions.

rework_checks.description: Names of checks that require code changes to resolve. These will trigger an auto-move to clarification for a separate code rework flow.

items.description: Full check name as shown in the PR status checks (e.g. 'Code Checks', 'Simtest Status')
